storyInfo: Joanna and Enya defeat the assassins with Degenbrecher's help, and discover a plot to implicate Paleroches in the murder of the Saintess. Ratatos draws out hidden spies by pretending to work with the Victorians, but dies in an explosion caused by the spies.

attributes.content: Back already, Gulo? You still have the gauze on your head.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: I told you to think before you act! You get back to the hospital right now and stay in bed.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Master... I heard that you're going to meet with Ratatos again, at the Browntails' invitation.
attributes.name: Gulo

attributes.content: You can't go...
attributes.name: Gulo

attributes.content: What, you think I'm afraid of her?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: That witch says she's going to tell me the truth. I'm eager to see what she spews from that mouth of hers.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: But master... the meeting is on Browntail turf. This is clearly a trap.
attributes.name: Gulo

attributes.content: Hmph, you think I don't know?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: A Paleroche never runs from a fight!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Just because it's her turf doesn't mean a Paleroche is helpless there!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: You know what? Seeing that gauze on your head is making me doubly-mad!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: I don't care how mad you are, master! I'm sitting right here at the door and not budging an inch until you change your mind!
attributes.name: Gulo

attributes.content: And what does any of that have to do with you?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: It's my own fault I got hurt and couldn't protect you. All I can do is stop you from putting yourself in danger.
attributes.name: Gulo

attributes.content: Uh... I'm not angry at you! I'm angry at those bloody Browntails.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Don't worry, I'll settle the score for you. I'll show them nobody messes with Clan Paleroche.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Get out of the way, brother.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Master...
attributes.name: Gulo

attributes.content: Warriors, take General Gulo back to his room.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Several warriors help Gulo up and help him walk back to his room.
Hmph.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: I'm not afraid of them. But I won't go unprepared.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Fy faen. Prepare a few more cars, boys.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Dinner is ready, Madam Sciurus.
attributes.name: Browntail Butler

attributes.content: What about the matriarch? Will she not join us?
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Matriarch Ratatos just left. She says not to worry about her.
attributes.name: Browntail Butler

attributes.content: I remember the matriarch saying she had a meeting with Clan Paleroche today. But it's so early...
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: Did she go alone?
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: We're not sure...
attributes.name: Browntail Butler

attributes.content: Something doesn't feel right, Yucatan.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Go after her.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Alright...
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: One moment, please, Madam Sciurus and Master Yucatan...
attributes.name: Browntail Butler

attributes.content: What is it this time?
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: The matriarch left orders before she left...
attributes.name: Browntail Butler

attributes.content: We are not to allow the two of you to leave home tonight.
attributes.name: Browntail Butler

attributes.content: Under any circumstances.
attributes.name: Browntail Butler

attributes.content: Saintess! Get down!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Drat... Who are these people?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: How dare they attempt to murder the Saintess on Kjerag soil?!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Maybe they're not from Kjerag...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: They're dangerous...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Don't worry, Saintess! I'll protect you with my life!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: They won't get in so easily... Don't underestimate the hunters of Kjerag!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: The young huntress locks and loads her heavy crossbow, barely taking any time to aim it through the broken window before pulling the trigger.
It is immediately followed by multiple screams.
Hit.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Careful, there are a lot of them!
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: We can't just stay here. We need to get out...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: What do we do—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Calm down. Listen to me...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Lying prone on the snow, the attacker gestures to those behind him to remain hidden. They learned their lesson the hard way.
They slowly close in on the house, on guard against the crossbow bolts that can be fired from the window at any time with uncanny accuracy.
They could see a shadow move behind the curtain, and the edges of the curtain sway...
The attacker raises his crossbow.
The poisoned bolt strikes the figure behind the curtain. He hears the sound of the body hitting the floor, then silence.
Hit. Not sure if she's down.
attributes.name: Attacker

attributes.content: Units Two, Three and Four, hold position. Unit One, with me. Approach with care. The intel says there are two of them.
attributes.name: Attacker

attributes.content: Several figures sneak up to the house, breaking in once they have determined no sound coming from inside.
What...? This... It's...
attributes.name: Attacker

attributes.content: ...A wooden sculpture?
attributes.name: Attacker

attributes.content: A sculpture of Kjeragandr lies on the ground, a crossbow bolt sticking out of its head.
The assailants did not notice the delicate sound of machinery operating as they entered the room.
They hear the ringing of a bell, while their arms and legs go weak.
Five loaded crossbows and a massive net take aim at the invaders.
They fell for it! Just like you said!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: You'd better repent for damaging a sculpture of Kjeragandr!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Now! Run!
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Alpha, report.
attributes.name: Victorian Spy

attributes.content: The Paleroche convoy has cleared the third checkpoint.
attributes.name: Alpha

attributes.content: Confirm target position—back seat of the lead car.
attributes.name: Alpha

attributes.content: Shall we engage?
attributes.name: Alpha

attributes.content: Affirmative.
attributes.name: Victorian Spy

attributes.content: Wait, there's a change in the situation!
attributes.name: Alpha

attributes.content: The target's stopped moving. No direct line-of-sight. I can't see what's going on.
attributes.name: Alpha

attributes.content: Browntail warriors? What are they doing here?
attributes.name: Alpha

attributes.content: Stand by. I'm calling Number One.
attributes.name: Victorian Spy

attributes.content: What's the meaning of this?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Your matriarch told us to come to meet her, then sent you to stop us?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: The location of the meeting is just ahead, Sir Arctosz. This will only take a minute of your time.
attributes.name: Browntail Guard

attributes.content: Please allow us to search your vehicles, in the interest of safety.
attributes.name: Browntail Guard

attributes.content: What a joke. You're afraid of a handful of boys when your people picked the location? You people are cowards.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: The orders came from Matriarch Ratatos. We request your cooperation.
attributes.name: Browntail Guard

attributes.content: Hmph. Do what you want. I've got nothing to hide.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: No issues. You may proceed now, Sir Arctosz.
attributes.name: Browntail Guard

attributes.content: Not so fast.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: You searched us. Now, we search you.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Search every nook and cranny from here to the Browntail manor, the road and everything around it.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: You find anybody suspicious, take them in!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Yes, sir!
attributes.name: Paleroche Guard

attributes.content: Report on the target's location, Alpha.
attributes.name: Victorian Spy

attributes.content: Come in, Alpha.
attributes.name: Victorian Spy

attributes.content: Alpha, can you hear me? Report!
attributes.name: Victorian Spy

attributes.content: What's going on...?
attributes.name: Victorian Spy

attributes.content: Command, the target car has entered our surveillance zone and is approaching the final point of action. Should we move?
attributes.name: Charlie

attributes.content: When did he... is there any movement from the target?
attributes.name: Victorian Spy

attributes.content: No, the target hasn't exited the vehicle. I can't see inside from here.
attributes.name: Charlie

attributes.content: Stand by. Engage once you have visual on the target.
attributes.name: Victorian Spy

attributes.content: Bravo reporting.
attributes.name: Bravo

attributes.content: We have visual on what we believe to be an armed Kjerag patrol.
attributes.name: Bravo

attributes.content: Have you identified them?
attributes.name: Victorian Spy

attributes.content: Unclear, possibly Paleroche guards.
attributes.name: Bravo

attributes.content: Charlie reporting! We've spotted Kjerag warriors too. They're searching nearby buildings.
attributes.name: Charlie

attributes.content: Our position may be compromised. Should we make a move now?
attributes.name: Charlie

attributes.content: Negative, stand by.
attributes.name: Victorian Spy

attributes.content: We've been compromised! Engaging!
attributes.name: Bravo

attributes.content: They found us! We've been exposed, repeat, we've been exposed!
attributes.name: Charlie

attributes.content: Permission for final action!
attributes.name: Charlie

attributes.content: Bloody hell...
attributes.name: Victorian Spy

attributes.content: Affirmative—
attributes.name: Victorian Spy

attributes.content: The north winds blow, over the mountain road...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: The tuskbeast hides, among the rocks he bides...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Take your bow, swing it low...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: ...By the little wood window.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Hit.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: The forest is the domain of the hunter.
The young huntress takes Enya into the forest, the mysterious assailants in hot pursuit.
Their numbers are soon thinned by crossbow bolts that seem to come out of nowhere.
There's at least one more... where are you...?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: The huntress knows that her last shot has revealed her position, while the enemy has withdrawn into the shadows.
She hides behind a large tree, zeroing in on one little sound.
Lock, load, loose—
Missed?!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: The young huntress is pushed to the ground as her shot misses.
The attacker picks up a bolt from the ground and aims it at her throat.
But he never gets the chance to bring his raised hand down. It is frozen.
A blurred silhouette appears from above the assailant, bringing the weight of a thousand mountains down upon his head.
The ground trembles, and the snow on the tree branches is scattered...
...Degenbrecher?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Degenbrecher catches the bolt flying towards her with one hand.
Who are you?! What do you want with the Saintess?!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Stop, Joanna! Degenbrecher is a friend.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Degenbrecher...?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Joanna hesitantly removes the bolt from her crossbow as she looks up and down at Degenbrecher.
I've heard your name before... they say you're a strong warrior.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: But I've never seen... a man beaten into permafrost like that...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: What are you doing here, Degenbrecher?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Enciodes sent me.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: I apologize, but now is not the time to stick to the rules.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: How did he know I was in danger...?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: This is not the only attack in recent days.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: There were attempts on the lives of the members of Clans Silverash and Paleroche, soon after you left the Vine-Bead Court. The three clans are on the brink of civil war.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: How could this be...?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: These people...
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Only now do the trio have the time to take a long look at the assailants—late assailants, more precisely.
They are wearing Paleroche armor, and they are carrying standard-issue Kjerag weapons.
Clan Paleroche...?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: That's impossible!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Clan Paleroche has always been loyal. They would never think of murdering the Saintess!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: But there has to be an explanation for these people.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Th-They must be in disguise! Someone is trying to frame the Paleroches!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Let me see... There must be some gap in their disguise...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Yes! Look at this bolt!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Hmph! These people thought they could fool us wearing Paleroche clothes, but they got a very important thing wrong.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Look, the bolts they're carrying are two-fletched, but the ones used by Paleroche warriors are three-fletched, which are more suitable for battle than hunting.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Dad told me that our family was the best, most loyal warriors of the Paleroches before we split from the clan.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Our shooting skills were passed down from our ancestors, who used them in war, mostly against—
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: ...against the Silverashes.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: A logical explanation.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: All ancient history now.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: The wars between the three clans, Paleroche, Browntail, and Silverash, have long since come to an end, and your family became hunters under Kjeragandr's kind guidance.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Yes... by Kjeragandr...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: It's not hard to guess who is impersonating Clan Paleroche.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: The Victorians...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Degenbrecher pulls a bolt from one of the Victorian's necks and examines it.
Did you make this yourself?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: Yes, my dad taught me when I was little. The craftsmanship has been passed down my family from one generation to the next.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: From one generation to the next?
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: The cut of the fletching, the shape of the point, even the etching on the shaft, these are all unique to Ursus.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: How's that possible? Dad said it's a mark of Kjeragandr's faithful.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: I've seen arrows like these in the arenas of Kazimierz many times, used by those who claimed to master the most authentic Ursine martial arts.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: A gimmick, no doubt, but the GCC also sponsors legitimate historians. I've read their papers and seen the artifacts they dug up.
attributes.name: Degenbrecher

attributes.content: But... but we're all indigenous to Kjerag. We used to be part of Clan Paleroche!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: What does Ursus have to do with Kjerag?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: ...Enya?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: '...Some brought flags, some brought drums, and some brought swords.'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: 'The three outsiders fought constantly, and their blood turned the rivers red, and She grieved.'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: 'She went to the place of battle and said—'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: 'Sheathe your weapons and let your hearts be joined, and I will bestow upon you the blessings of prosperity, and protect you from ill.'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: 'But the three were foolish, and continued to fight even after they heard Her words.'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: 'So She cracked the heavens and split the clouds, and She brought forth a miracle, and the fighting was stopped.'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: 'One of them wept: But how could we forget the hatred, the blood that was shed?'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: 'And She wept as well, and Her tears froze the enemy, becoming three eternally frozen peaks.'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: ...What was that?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: A passage from the Kjeragandr that is often overlooked... now, I think I understand.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Joanna, I believe that your family... indeed, all of Clan Paleroche, originally came from Ursus.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: You think so too?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Yes. But it's not just you. The Silverashes and Browntails came from elsewhere as well.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: As the scriptures say, our three clans were outsiders who fought incessantly over resources, until Kjeragandr intervened.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: The 'three frozen peaks' seem to refer literally to the three mountains surrounding Kjerag, but it in fact refers to the domains of the three clans, which She had demarcated.
attributes.name: Enya
Enya
attributes.content: 'She will come again, if the swords are not laid down.'

attributes.name: Enya
attributes.content: Several years ago, She manifested through me, averting what would have been the first civil war between the three clans in centuries.
The hearts of the three clans must be joined in order to receive Her protection...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: The first virtue that Kjeragandr taught us was... forgiveness...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: We got them, master!
attributes.name: Paleroche Guard

attributes.content: The tall guards bring over several prisoners, bound with ropes.
These guys were hiding in some abandoned houses, clearly up to no good. They had binoculars and communications equipment on them. Victorians, by the looks of it.
attributes.name: Paleroche Guard

attributes.content: Ha. Just as I thought.
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Ratatos is plotting with the Victorians to kill me. We'll take these men to her—
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: No, we'll do it in front of the Vine-Bead Court with all three clans present, and we'll see what she has to say for herself!
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Who's there—
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: We caught the remaining Victorian spies, Sir Arctosz. We are glad to see that you are unharmed.
attributes.name: Browntail Guard

attributes.content: What? What do you mean?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: Matriarch Ratatos's orders were to protect you, Sir Arctosz.
attributes.name: Browntail Guard

attributes.content: We had been following you, and stopped these men when they attempted to make a move against you.
attributes.name: Browntail Guard

attributes.content: The warriors put their bound prisoners down.
What in the name of Kjeragandr...?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: ...Where is Ratatos?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: We do not know.
attributes.name: Browntail Guard

attributes.content: She said she would try to draw out the spies that Victoria has deployed around here. When they reveal themselves, we can—
attributes.name: Browntail Guard

attributes.content: The old Browntail manor explodes, its walls torn apart like cardboard.
Glass and wood fragments fly in all directions, as flames consume the traces of a once sumptuous history. The boiling smoke distorts the night air.
The Paleroche warriors stand transfixed, eyes wide. Behind the brown car, some warriors caught by the blast now stagger as they try to help each other up.
The echoes of the explosion gradually disperse, leaving the crackle of wood and distant sirens ever clearer in the night.
A charred jacket drifts down in front of Arctosz.
This is...
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: ...Ratatos?
attributes.name: Arctosz

attributes.content: What the hell have you done?!
attributes.name: Arctosz
